D1 Optics L5 Evaluate Reference

Stokes Parameters of Any Beam

reduce any polarization, even partial, to four measurable numbers S₀ S₁ S₂ S₃

S₀ is total intensity; S₁ favours horizontal vs vertical; S₂ favours ±45°; S₃ favours right vs left circular. Together they pin down any state.

Set the amplitudes, phase, and a depolarization that mixes in unpolarized light. The bars show the Stokes vector; the readout gives the degree of polarization.
